headline: Keysight and Sateliot Win European Space Agency and GSMA Foundry Challenge for 6G Innovation
summary: SANTA ROSA, Calif., April 07, 2026--Award recognizes joint work supporting secure and reliable satellite-terrestrial integration for future 3GPP non-terrestrial networks.
